title: License
description: License and usage reporting status of NGINX Plus instance.

eval.description: Indicates whether NGINX Plus license is trial.

active_till.description: The Unix timestamp of license expiration.

healthy.description: Indicates whether the reporting state is still considered healthy despite recent failed attempts.

fails.description: The number of failed reporting attempts, reset each time the usage report is successfully sent.

grace.description: The number of seconds before traffic processing is stopped after unsuccessful report attempt.

uuid.description: The ID of NGINX Plus instance in the UUID format.
